subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: This lesson is to explain, if it be possible for either a believer or an unbeliever to advance in the next world. The believer attains to eternal life in this world.
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
